mSDataSet.OriginalText:
In order to track usage trends of this service and ensure its effective operation, as well as
to prevent any improper usage, Pokémon Champions collects the following information:
・ Gameplay data for this application
・ Performance errors

This information will be used in accordance with the guidelines explained in the Privacy Notice.

You can use this application even if you elect not to share this information.
